lesson.menu_desc: Reading + past simple regular verbs to talk about last week at work -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 12 -- Last Week's Results -- Talking About the Past (Regular Verbs)
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Maísa de Oliveira Santos | Aula 12 -- Last Week's Results

paras: Last week was very busy for Maísa. On Monday, she started a new project with her team. She worked on the numbers every morning and checked all the reports.
On Wednesday, Maísa called three clients about their budgets. Two clients were happy, but one client asked for a big discount.
On Thursday, Maísa finished a big report for her manager. It was not easy, but she did a good job. On Friday, the team closed a small deal with a new client. Everyone was very happy with the result.
Maísa did not work on Saturday. She rested at home and did not check her email. On Sunday, she was ready for a new week.

reading.prompt: What is the best one-line summary of this text?
choices: Maísa had a quiet week and did no work at all.
Maísa tells about the things she did at work last week.
Maísa started a new job at a different company.

items: Maísa started a new project on Monday.
The text says: "On Monday, she started a new project with her team."
Maísa called five clients on Wednesday.
She called three clients, not five: "she called three clients about their budgets."
The team closed a small deal on Friday.
The text says: "On Friday, the team closed a small deal with a new client."
The text says Maísa did not work on Saturday. She rested at home.

listenings.text: Hi, this is David. Last week was a good week for me. On Monday, I started a new report about our sales. I worked on the numbers for two days. On Wednesday, I called some clients in London. On Friday, my team closed a big deal. I was very happy with the result. I did not work on the weekend. I rested at home. How was your week?

Good morning. This is Sarah from the finance team. Last week I was very busy. On Tuesday, I finished the budget for the new project. I checked all the numbers two times. On Thursday, I called a new client about a discount. We talked for one hour. On Friday, I started a new report, but I did not finish it. I will finish it today. Have a good day!

extra_audio.text: Last week was very busy for me. On Monday, I started a new project. On Thursday, I finished the report. On Friday, my team closed a small deal.
